tools.name: nexez_search
tools.description: Search across all Nexez merchants for services/products matching a buyer request. Returns ranked listings with offers + agent.json URLs.

tools.name: nexez_directory
tools.description: Browse the cross-merchant Nexez directory (optionally filtered by category, query, minimum readiness, or location).

tools.name: nexez_get_page
tools.description: Fetch a listing's full structured agent manifest (seller profile, offers, actions) by slug.

tools.name: nexez_validate_checkout
tools.description: Dry-run a checkout for an offer BEFORE paying — validates the offer, currency, and payment readiness. Never charges.

tools.name: nexez_validate_negotiation
tools.description: Dry-run a negotiation proposal against the seller’s rules BEFORE submitting. Returns the rules evaluation. Never writes.
